title: minuartia recurva subsp. condensata
intro: Minuartia recurva subsp. condensata, also known as Alpine Willowherb or Rockrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Minuartia recurva subsp. condensata include reducing inflammation and pain, treating wounds and skin conditions, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
